channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-06-24 to 2026-06-30
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Wed 2026-06-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 09:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 7 kt NW, water 63°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Thu 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 11:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 8 kt SSW, water 65°F. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 63°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.0 sec). Sat 2026-06-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 2 kt ESE, water 64°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ESE). Sun 2026-06-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt SE, water 66°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SE). Mon 2026-06-29: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 2 kt ENE, water 67°F. Low tide: 01:32, 13:24. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE). Tue 2026-06-30: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 5 kt WSW, water 68°F. Low tide: 02:15, 14:07. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Wed 2026-06-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 09:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 7 kt NW, water 63°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Thu 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 11:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 8 kt SSW, water 65°F. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 63°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.0 sec).
  • Sat 2026-06-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 2 kt ESE, water 64°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ESE).
  • Sun 2026-06-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt SE, water 66°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (SE).
  • Mon 2026-06-29: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 2 kt ENE, water 67°F. Low tide: 01:32, 13:24. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE).
  • Tue 2026-06-30: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.7 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 5 kt WSW, water 68°F. Low tide: 02:15, 14:07. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
